summary: Completed frontend testing of FAQ redesign on /contacts page. Custom FaqList component successfully implemented with editorial design: slash numbering (1/, 2/, 3/...), large bold questions, animated '+' toggle (rotates to 'x'), thin gold divider lines, and LUMEN color palette (green/gold on cream). All interactive features working correctly.
passed_tests: FAQ container renders with correct data-testid (contacts-faq)
Slash numbering format (1/, 2/, 3/, 4/, 5/, 6/) displays in gold color
Large bold question text in deep green color
'+' toggle icons present on right side of each question
Thin horizontal divider lines with gold gradient under each question
Click to expand: question expands with animation, '+' rotates 135deg to 'x'
Click to collapse: question collapses, 'x' rotates back to '+'
Single-open behavior: opening one question automatically closes previously opened question
Answer text readable and correct (first answer mentions 'від $1,000')
Color scheme correct: cream background (rgb(251, 249, 244)), green text, gold accents
No console errors on page load or interaction
Suspense lazy loading works (brief spinner on initial load)
Framer Motion animations smooth and performant
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor note: Frontend required restart to pick up new FaqList component (hot reload didn't trigger). This is a deployment consideration, not a code issue. All functionality working perfectly after restart.
